summary_en: 260 shares acquired to increase stake from 31.8% to 100% ownership of Cats Inc., effective 2026-05-14. Board decision, share purchase agreement execution, and settlement all on same date. Purpose: leverage synergies in AI-driven SaaS solutions and IT consulting across power solutions group.
title_en: Notice regarding additional acquisition of shares in equity-method affiliate – Cats Inc. to become wholly owned subsidiary
translation_en_brief: Power Solutions decided on 2026-05-14 to acquire an additional 260 shares of Cats Inc., moving from a 31.8% equity-method affiliate stake to 100% ownership (560 shares total, 100% voting). The share purchase agreement was executed the same day, with settlement also on 2026-05-14. Cats is an IT consulting and SaaS solutions provider founded in 1982, based in Yokohama, with FY2025 (ending 30 June) revenue of ¥740M and operating profit of ¥58M. Power Solutions cited synergies with its existing human resources and expertise in advanced AI-driven solutions, as well as strategic cross-functional complementarity, as rationale for the consolidation. The transaction is expected to have immaterial impact on consolidated earnings for the current period. The company disclosed this voluntarily despite it not meeting timely-disclosure thresholds.
